---
title: "javier"
subtitle: "orraca-deatcu"
image: ./images/Javier_Profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 5em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: rss
      text: Blog
      href: https://www.javierorracadeatcu.com/blog
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/orraca/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/JavOrraca
comments: false
page-layout: full
---

Hi, I'm Javier! 👋 I’m a data science leader who works at the intersection of analytics, modeling, experimentation, and production-grade AI. **_My North Star is simple: Solve real problems with data and share the playbook._**

## Data Science & Applied AI

I first honed my analytics and modeling skills by building valuation and forecasting solutions using techniques such as ARIMA and gradient-boosted trees, then deepened my craft in health tech by developing applied machine learning and AI products for consumption at scale.

Today, I lead data analytics at Jeppesen ForeFlight, unifying how the organization measures and understands business, product, and financial performance. I partner closely with leadership to turn data into trusted insight, while laying the groundwork for advanced analytics and applied AI as the business evolves.

## Languages

My daily languages include R, Python, SQL, and Bash, but my preferred language is R. I use R for a wide range of work including ML/AI model development, package creation, communication with data warehouses and REST APIs, vector DB + RAG solutions, automation pipelines, interactive apps, and websites (for example, this site was built with R + [Quarto](https://quarto.org/)).

## Data Science Communities

There are a plethora of online and in-person data science communities to learn from and share your own experiences. Online communities for open-source languages and data science are incredibly welcoming and below are my favorites:

- [SoCal R Users Group](https://www.meetup.com/socal-rug/ "SoCal RUG meets on a monthly basis for online and in-person events")
- [Data Science Hangout](https://posit.co/data-science-hangout/ "Data Science Hangout hosted by Posit's Rachael Dempsey, Thursdays at 12pm ET")
- [R-Ladies Global](https://rladies.org/ "R-Ladies Is A World-Wide Organization To Promote Gender Diversity In The R Community")
